Describe the sequence of actions performed on the white paper from the start until it is held.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a white sheet lies centered on a black surface; at 2s, hands enter the frame near the bottom edge; at 4s, the left hand presses down while the right grips the edge; at 6s, the paper curves as fingers press to create a crease; at 10s, the hands hold the slightly bent paper horizontally.

question: Explain how the hands interact with the paper during the folding process.
canonical_answer: At 2s, two hands appear at the bottom of the frame touching the paper; at 4s, the left hand presses the lower left portion firmly; at 6s, both hands manipulate the paper causing it to curve upward; at 10s, the white sheet is held horizontally while appearing slightly bent along its length.
